mechanism_axis: observability-aware static measurement scheduling + grouped conservative feedback fusion on Round61 backbone

dataset.constraint_note: Use exactly the same fixed noisy dataset/noise strength/seed as Round65/66 mainline

clean_win_gate: mean<0, max<=0, dKg_xx<0 and no hard-protected regression vs Round61

round67_candidates.name: r67_obs_sched_reinf_mild
round67_candidates.description: Observability-aware static-measurement reinforcement only (no grouped feedback change).
round67_candidates.rationale: Isolate one new knob: reinforce extra static measurement only when dominant-scale observability exceeds protected-group observability.

round67_candidates.name: r67_obs_sched_reinf_bal_grouplite
round67_candidates.description: Mild observability reinforcement plus light grouped feedback scaling by parameter family.
round67_candidates.rationale: Add a small grouped-feedback layer to protect yy/Ka_xx while keeping xx/zz reinforcement active.

round67_candidates.name: r67_grouped_conservative_guard
round67_candidates.description: Grouped conservative fusion only (no extra measurement), with explicit yy/Ka_xx/lever guard.
round67_candidates.rationale: Paper-friendly grouped-update baseline: keep measurement schedule unchanged and make feedback fusion conservative for protected groups.

round67_candidates.name: r67_async_static_window_guard
round67_candidates.description: Asynchronous static-window reinforcement (skip early windows) plus protected grouped guard.
round67_candidates.rationale: Test grouped/asynchronous update scheduling by enabling reinforcement only after static evidence stabilizes.
